import io
import string

fn find_last_newline(_ s: String, _ before: Int) -> Int
  mut i = before - 1
  mut result = -1
  mut done = false
  while i >= 0 and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        result = i
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
    if not done
      i = i - 1
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut end_idx = n
  mut found_line = ""
  mut found = false
  mut keep_going = true

  while keep_going
    if found
      keep_going = false
    else if end_idx <= 0
      keep_going = false
    else
      let nl = find_last_newline(s, end_idx)
      let line_start = nl + 1
      let line = string.substring(s, line_start, end_idx)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        found_line = line
        found = true
      else
        if nl < 0
          end_idx = 0
        else
          end_idx = nl
        end
      end
    end
  end

  if found
    println(found_line)
  else
    println("(none)")
  end
end
